calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-28-2012 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion To Approve Prop 65 Settlement And Proposed Consent Judgment As To Sky High International, Llc And Kmart Corp
Off Calendar May-06-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF ANTHONY E. HELD, Ph.D., P.E.'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND [PROPOSED] CONSENT JUDGMENT AS TO SKY HIGH INTERNATIONAL, L.L.C. AND KMART CORPORATION.

APPEARANCES: Brian C. Johnson, Esq. of The Chanler Group 510/848-8880 for pltf & moving party, & specially appearing for deft Sky High International, L.L.C.; no other appearances.

RULING: The Court made a personal disclosure on the record. No objections were made. The Court granted the motion (approving the settlement between plaintiff and defendant Sky High International, L.L.C. Note, defendant KMART Corporation has been dismissed). Order and judgment signed in open court. (302/MJM) Judge: Marla J. Miller, Reporter: Loretta Najera, CSR #5153
